title: Meme sound mace
description: Changes the mace to a 3D model of a pipe and changes vanilla sounds to meme sounds
body:
**This resource pack changes the model of a mace to a 3D model of a pipe, and also changes its vanilla hit sounds to meme sounds such as: "Lobotomy sound", "Vine boom" and others. Download and enjoy!**

Also chek out my other project: https://modrinth.com/project/2Ub2RDRW
